title: Amtech W5300 400mm (16") Heavy Duty Water Pump Pliers
features: DURABLE: This 400mm (16") heavy duty water pump plier is made from drop forged and heat treated steel for durability
COMFORTABLE AND EASY TO USE: With cushion soft matt grip handles, it has serrated gripping jaws and an easily adjustable slip joint
GARDEN ESSENTIAL: A must-have for all types of garden maintenance
LOCKING MECHANISM: Safety lock ensures secure storage after use
SMOOTH ACTION: Spring-loaded for easy repeated cutting
description: Product Description Drop forged and heat treated Cushion soft matt grip handles for extra comfort and ease of use Serrated gripping jaws - - There's nothing more satisfying that a job well done, whether that's a major project or a small repair but some of us need a bit of a helping hand in terms of getting the right tool for the job. Amtech have literally thousands of high quality products and you are almost guaranteed to find exactly what your looking for. Safety Warning No
